caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room, watching a video on a screen. The man on the left wears a dark gray t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a lighter gray t-shirt and a necklace with a pendant. He rests his hand on his chin. Behind them is a television displaying the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in yellow letters, and a shelf filled with various CDs. A small inset video window shows a dark scene. In the first frame, the inset shows a silhouetted figure in an arched doorway with the text "The only one who poses a threat to Denmark is..." In the second frame, the inset shows a blurry, dark forest scene. In the third and fourth frames, the inset displays a silhouetted figure standing before a large, ornate gothic window. The final frame includes the text "Shabnam Khan" at the bottom of the inset.
